news.title: U.S. grocery slowdown deepens as shoppers buy fewer items, raising pressure on food companies
news.summary: The U.S. grocery slowdown is deepening as shoppers buy fewer items. Grocers and brands are having to compete harder on price and value.

news.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock retreats back to IPO price
news.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

news.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
news.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.

news.title: Truth Social launches service to give Wall Street traders an edge with real-time service
news.summary: Trump Media launched an API to give paying customers real-time access to market-moving Truth Social posts. The API will be available to all of Trump Media's customers.

news.title: Iran warns U.S. of Hormuz ‘red line,’ says it will retaliate if Trump carries out threats
news.summary: The U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume. Trump warned that the U.N. Security Council will vote on a resolution on Iran next week.

news.title: Oil is facing a supply crunch — and the war in Iran isn’t the only problem
news.summary: Constraints on Russia’s refining system have added to the existing crisis, strategists at J.P. Morgan said. “It is a very, very difficult time for Russia,” they said.

news.title: Retail sales get a boost from car buyers and Amazon Prime Day. The economy hasn’t lost its mojo.
news.summary: Sales at retailers rose in June as Americans bought more new cars and spent more online. Amazon’s annual summer sales event signaled steady growth in the U.S. economy.

news.title: AI is killing the cover letter — but here’s when it still pays to send one
news.summary: “For really everyone other than AI providers, the process is broken,” he says. “For ... everyone else, the system is broken.”

news.title: GE boosts profit outlook, but stock falls as booming order growth cools
news.summary: GE Aerospace’s stock falls after earnings, again, with recently rapid order-book growth slowing. GE Aerospace's order book growth slowing, again.

news.title: Who qualifies for the bigger IRS tax break on gas — and how to get the most of it
news.summary: The IRS is going to let some drivers write off more of their fuel expenses. Gas prices could return to $4 soon, and the IRS is letting them write off some of the cost.
